message:
chore(ci): regenerate certification and conformance gate artifacts

Refresh all CI gate artifacts with current timestamps from a fresh
full-suite gate run. All gate verdicts and pass/fail statuses are
unchanged — only timestamps updated from 2026-03-12 to 2026-03-15.

Affected artifact sets:
- tests/cross_platform_reports/linux/: platform events, report, markdown
- tests/ext_conformance/reports/: conformance summary + report markdown
- tests/full_suite_gate/: all 11 gate artifacts (certification events,
  verdicts, full suite events, perf3x audit, waiver audit, preflight,
  practical finish, artifact retention)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
